strategy: ## Task: Add Intersect (交集) feature button + Combine PropertyManager rollout ## Scope: - INCLUDED: - Create CombineRollout (operation selector: ADD/SUBTRACT/INTERSECT + tool body picker) - Register it in PartFeaturePropertyManager/index.tsx for COMBINE type - Add Intersect button to FeaturesTab.tsx (creates COMBINE with operation:INTERSECT) - Add INTERSECT to DEFAULT_RIBBON_LAYOUT - Add backend test for INTERSECT operation - EXCLUDED: - Changes to geometry_service.py, features.py, or any backend logic (already supports INTERSECT) - Changes to the Combine API endpoint (already works) ## Strategy: 1. Create combine-rollout.tsx → operation radio buttons + tool_feature_id dropdown 2. Index.tsx → register { combine-rollout } for COMBINE type 3. FeaturesTab.tsx → add Intersect button (creates COMBINE + operation:INTERSECT) 4. types.ts → add INTERSECT to DEFAULT_RIBBON_LAYOUT.FEATURES 5. Run frontend tests ✅ 6. Commit + push ## Verification Conditions: - [ ] Intersect button visible in Features tab - [ ] Clicking Intersect → creates COMBINE feature with operation:INTERSECT - [ ] CombineRollout shows operation radio (ADD/SUBTRACT/INTERSECT) - [ ] Tool body dropdown shows available features - [ ] 89 frontend + 83 backend tests pass ## Constraints: - Follow existing PropertyManager rollout pattern exactly - No backend changes needed - tool_feature_id type matches existing CADFeature.parameters pattern
